accent_strategy.description: One muted vermilion warning retained as the last coherent signal in the frame.

dominant_mass_strategy.description: A calm blue field occupying the right side like indifferent atmosphere after the decision is already locked.

historical_anchor.description: The launch event collapses into a distant formal rupture rather than a literal disaster tableau.

final.negative_prompt: high detail, texture, noise, photoreal clutter, multiple subjects, complex background, dramatic lighting, motion blur, busy composition, ornate realism, dense foliage detail, complex sky, center-weighted composition, symmetrical layout, multiple bright accents, text, watermark, logo, ui overlay
final.prompt: Minimal surreal editorial composition. Quiet, reduced, asymmetrical image with one subtle breach in reality and high thumbnail clarity. The frame should feel paused, suspended, and slightly unresolved. The historical subject must remain legible but reduced to an emblematic silhouette. Strip forms to simple silhouettes and essential geometry only. Use one dominant environmental color field and keep every secondary tone muted or neutral. One side must carry the visual weight while the opposite side stays mostly empty. Reserve one saturated accent as a semantic signal rather than decoration. Keep surfaces quiet with only slight painterly bleed at edges. Hold the image in stillness so it feels like a paused system state with implied consequence. Maintain at least 60% negative space with an asymmetrical focal mass. Use no more than 4 colors and only 1 saturated accent. Allow exactly 1 surreal breach and keep everything else coherent. Lighting must remain soft diffuse. Do not include text, logo, ui_artifacts, motion_blur, photoreal_clutter. Editorial finish pass. Keep the scene calm, legible, and emotionally compressed without adding detail. Historical anchor: The launch event collapses into a distant formal rupture rather than a literal disaster tableau.. Historical topic: Flame and breakup. Single surreal breach: The rupture reads as a formal split in space instead of a literal explosion.. Caption safety: keep the top UI band clear at x=0.00-1.00, y=0.00-0.12 and keep critical subject matter out of the subtitle band at x=0.08-0.92, y=0.74-0.96. Hero subject: A fractured launch column reduced to a single broken vertical event.. Subject archetype: breach_plume. Dominant mass: A calm blue field occupying the right side like indifferent atmosphere after the decision is already locked.. Accent: One muted vermilion warning retained as the last coherent signal in the frame.. Reflection: A pale reflective floor band that keeps the frame calm and editorial even at the point of rupture.. Single subject in mind only; no source references are used. Scene intent: Render the catastrophe as one split structure at distance so the emotional register stays grave rather than spectacular..

prompt_overrides.scene_intent: Render the catastrophe as one split structure at distance so the emotional register stays grave rather than spectacular.
